title: Split config.json into db.json and api.json

grade.command: node -e "const f=require('fs');const db=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('db.json','utf8'));const api=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('api.json','utf8'));if(db.port!==5432||db.host!=='localhost')throw new Error('db');if(api.timeout!==30)throw new Error('api');const c=JSON.parse(f.readFileSync('config.json','utf8'));if(!c.db||!c.api)throw new Error('config changed');console.log('ok')"
